design_components.name: post-sentinel-hook
design_components.description: kick_dispatch.hexa exposes post-sentinel emission hook (after __KICK_RESULT__ printed)

design_components.name: trailer-emit-from-witness
design_components.description: hook reads witness JSON fixpoint_marker (reason equiv) + carry_forward (fix equiv) + emits raw 66-style trailer

design_components.name: fallback-on-witness-missing
design_components.description: if witness JSON missing (raw 100 fallback), emit minimal trailer with witness path + reason=witness-not-captured + fix=in-context-synthesis-required

axis_b.name: raw 66 trailer schema in CLI output
axis_b.format_spec:
after __KICK_RESULT__ <PASS|FAIL>:
reason: <fixpoint_marker[:80]>
fix: 1) absorb tier_1 to <repo>/state/discovery_absorption/registry.jsonl 2) review witness JSON 3) carry_forward to next cycle

axis_c.name: raw 136 enforcement gap closure
axis_c.post_extension_projection: all NEW kicks comply 100%; legacy non-compliance grandfathered per raw 102 forward-spec convention

fan_out.correlation_estimate: axes a/b/c interlocking — a=mechanism, b=schema, c=outcome. corr ~0.40 each. raw 48 PASS but moderate overlap acknowledged.
